title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning to school-aged students. The program uses research-backed pedagogies to teach foundational AI and responsible use, and has reached educators in over 165 countries.
